title: What's the through-line connecting my Ahmad Jamal note from 2022 to my Rankett work in 2026?
html:
Question

"What's the through-line connecting my Ahmad Jamal note from 2022 to my Rankett work in 2026?"

Synthesized answer

The 2022 Ahmad Jamal note is a polymath dump — jazz, web3, OSU coursework, ChatGPT wedge ideas, founder mantras, dating, dad-wisdom. On its surface it has nothing to do with Rankett. But buried in that single junk-drawer are all three load-bearing premises of Rankett's 2026 thesis, written down before they had names.

Premise 1 — "Asking the right question will be the next best skill to have." Three weeks after ChatGPT launched, Yahir wrote the line that becomes the asking the right question concept. In 2026, that line is literally the product. Rankett is a system for optimizing how brands appear when prompts are the new keywords (2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide). The same instinct that told 2022-Yahir "the post-LLM stack rewards prompters and problem-framers, not technicians" is the one that now sells ai search optimization across chatgpt, anthropic claude, gemini, perplexity, grok, deepseek, and google ai overviews.

Premise 2 — "Seek nonobvious things". Triple-occurrence in the Ahmad Jamal note, paired with the explicit anti-pattern: "-obvious?? Customer service app." This is the founder filter that lets Rankett's category — "AI search optimization" — exist before the rest of the SEO world has named it. The 2026-01-13 panic-line "Are there people out there rn that are truly pursuing this with all of their intention and soul?" is the same nonobvious instinct, four years later, asking whether someone else got there first.

Premise 3 — "Take existing things if equivalent value, but make them with 1/10 less resources and significantly cheaper." The 2022 line that prefigures Rankett's $998/seat → $3K–$6K agency markup (2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide). Same compression instinct, productized.

The connective tissue across the four years is the chatgpt wedge brainstorm in the same 2022 note: "talking Tom advice giver as Steve Jobs / Jesus / Jay-Z," the dream app mentioned twice, the customer-service idea immediately self-rejected as obvious. He was workshopping LLM applications in October 2022, weeks after launch, and discarding the obvious ones in real time. Rankett is the version of that workshop that didn't get discarded.

The through-line, in one sentence: the polymath dump of 2022 is Rankett's spec sheet, written before there was a product to spec. The Ahmad Jamal note is also where voluntary adversity and fear of not doing appear — the philosophical scaffolding that lets the Austin grind feel like something Yahir signed up for, not something happening to him.

Sources

  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream — origin document
  • 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide — Rankett GTM bible
  • 2026 01 13 rankett com — the "fucked me up" tweet self-prompt
  • asking the right question · nonobvious · disruption · ai search optimization · ai visibility engine
  • voluntary adversity · fear of not doing
  • chatgpt · dream app
  • Memory (for the "all my energy and time and future banking right now" framing)
